title: jacobaea buschiana
intro: Jacobaea buschiana, also known as Busch's ragwort, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic actions. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and easing respiratory issues. Jacobaea buschiana is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the form of dried flowers or roots in various folk remedies.
